---
title: "human_secretome_interactive"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-26"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggiraph)
library(glue)
library(htmltools)

entries_of_interest <- c("A0A140VK15", "I3L3R5", "A8MTW9",
                         "Q6UXQ4", "Q6PDA7", "A0A0G2JNB2")

```

```{r}
# Make sure annotation df exists
stopifnot(exists("final_secratome_df"))

annotations_df <- final_secratome_df %>%
  mutate(
    Entry           = as.character(Entry),
    protein_names   = as.character(Protein_names),
    protein_function = as.character(Protein_function)
  ) %>%
  select(Entry, protein_names, protein_function) %>%
  distinct()

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || all(is.na(x))) y else x

```

```{r}
build_activations_df <- function(df_model) {
  df_model %>%
    mutate(
      Entry          = as.character(Entry),
      residue        = as.character(residue),
      residue_number = as.integer(residue_number),
      probability    = as.numeric(probability)
    ) %>%
    filter(Entry %in% entries_of_interest) %>%
    left_join(annotations_df, by = "Entry") %>%
    transmute(
      Entry,
      position        = residue_number,
      residue,
      prob            = probability,
      protein_names,
      protein_function
    ) %>%
    arrange(Entry, position)
}

```

```{r}
secratome_mean_predicitons <- secratome_logreg_predicitons %>%
  transmute(Entry, residue, residue_number, prob_logreg = probability) %>%
  left_join(
    secratome_crf_predicitons %>%
      transmute(Entry, residue, residue_number, prob_crf = probability),
    by = c("Entry", "residue", "residue_number")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    secratome_ranfor_predicitons %>%
      transmute(Entry, residue, residue_number, prob_rf = probability),
    by = c("Entry", "residue", "residue_number")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    secratome_svm_predicitons %>%
      transmute(Entry, residue, residue_number, prob_svm = probability),
    by = c("Entry", "residue", "residue_number")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    probability = rowMeans(
      dplyr::select(., prob_logreg, prob_crf, prob_rf, prob_svm),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Entry, residue, residue_number, probability)

```


```{r}
make_profile_girafe <- function(activations_df, entry_id, model_label) {
  df_e <- activations_df %>%
    filter(Entry == entry_id) %>%
    arrange(position)
  
  if (nrow(df_e) == 0) {
    stop(glue("No data found for Entry = {entry_id}"))
  }
  
  seq_len <- max(df_e$position, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_max   <- suppressWarnings(max(df_e$prob, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(y_max) || y_max <= 0) y_max <- 1
  y_lim   <- max(1, y_max) * 1.05
  
  # X-axis spacing
  x_by <- dplyr::case_when(
    seq_len > 500 ~ 50L,
    seq_len > 350 ~ 40L,
    seq_len > 100 ~ 20L,
    TRUE          ~ 10L
  )
  x_breaks <- seq(0, seq_len, by = x_by)
  
  # Pull annotation info (same for all rows in this entry)
  prot_name <- df_e$protein_names[which(!is.na(df_e$protein_names))[1]] %||% NA_character_
  prot_func <- df_e$protein_function[which(!is.na(df_e$protein_function))[1]] %||% NA_character_
  
  title_label <- glue("{entry_id} ({model_label})")
  tooltip_title <- glue(
    "Entry: {entry_id}\n",
    "Protein: {prot_name %||% '—'}\n",
    "Function: {prot_func %||% '—'}"
  )
  
  p <- ggplot(df_e) +
    # --- interactive title (hover shows protein & function) ---
    geom_text_interactive(
      data = tibble(
        x       = (seq_len + 1) / 2,
        y       = max(1, y_lim) * 1.1,
        label   = title_label,
        tooltip = tooltip_title,
        data_id = entry_id
      ),
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, tooltip = tooltip, data_id = data_id),
      size   = 4,
      hjust  = 0.5,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    
    # --- bars: per-residue probabilities (no protein/function here) ---
    geom_col_interactive(
      aes(
        x       = position,
        y       = prob,
        tooltip = glue(
          "Entry: {Entry}\n",
          "Model: {model_label}\n",
          "Position: {position}\n",
          "Residue:  {residue}\n",
          "Probability: {round(prob, 3)}"
        ),
        data_id = paste0(Entry, "_", position)
      ),
      fill  = "steelblue",
      color = "gray40",
      size  = 0.1,
      width = 1,
      alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed",
               color = "maroon", size = 0.2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.3) +
    
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = x_breaks,
      limits = c(0.5, seq_len + 0.5),
      expand = expansion(0, 0)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, max(1, y_lim) * 1.35),   # extra headroom for the title
      expand = expansion(0, 0)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    labs(
      x = "Residue Position",
      y = "Probability"
    ) +
    theme(
      # we’re drawing our own title, so no ggplot title needed
      plot.margin       = margin(t = 25, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10),
      panel.grid.major  = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
      axis.line.y       = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.x      = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.y      = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.text.x       = element_text(color = "black", margin = margin(t = 4)),
      axis.text.y       = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.title.x      = element_text(margin = margin(t = 6)),
      axis.title.y      = element_text(margin = margin(r = 6)),
      panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )
  
  girafe(
    ggobj      = p,
    width_svg  = 11,
    height_svg = 5,
    options    = list(
      opts_hover(css = "fill-opacity:1;cursor:pointer;")
    )
  )
}


```


```{r}
build_html_for_model <- function(df_model, model_label, file_suffix) {
  activations_df <- build_activations_df(df_model)
  
  entries_for_plot <- entries_of_interest[
    entries_of_interest %in% unique(activations_df$Entry)
  ]
  
  widgets <- purrr::map(
    entries_for_plot,
    ~ make_profile_girafe(activations_df, entry_id = .x, model_label = model_label)
  )
  
  spaced_widgets <- lapply(widgets, function(w) {
    tags$div(style = "margin: 50px 20px;", w)
  })
  
  all_page <- tagList(lapply(spaced_widgets, function(w) list(w, htmltools::br())))
  
  out_dir <- file.path("../../figures/secretome_selected_peptides")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  html_out <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("secretome_", file_suffix, "_selected.html"))
  htmltools::save_html(all_page, html_out)
  cat("✔ Saved", model_label, "interactive profiles to:", html_out, "\n")
}

```

```{r}
build_html_for_model(secratome_logreg_predicitons,  "LogReg", "logreg")
build_html_for_model(secratome_crf_predicitons,      "CRF",    "crf")
build_html_for_model(secratome_ranfor_predicitons,   "RF",     "rf")
build_html_for_model(secratome_svm_predicitons,      "SVM",    "svm")
build_html_for_model(secratome_mean_predicitons,     "Mean",   "mean")

```
